title: Architect MFE Communication
description: Implement low-coupling communication patterns, such as Custom Events, for inter-MFE interaction. Architect a 'Global Bus' or similar actor model to facilitate communication between independently deployed MFEs. Design MFE communication strategies that prevent direct memory sharing and maintain autonomy.
objectives: Implement low-coupling communication patterns, such as Custom Events, for inter-MFE interaction.
